name: Kate
description: Kate is a young girl in the Shadow family, a noble family. Her "Living Doll" is [Emilico](https://anilist.co/character/127318/Emilico). Like the rest of the Shadow family, Kate is a shadow. Her whole body including her hair is black. She wears a red dress with a white frill underneath. She is a very calm and intelligent young girl. __Season One Spoiler__ ~!At the beginning of the story she is very distant with Emilico although she cares about her. name: Lucifer
description: Lucifer is a fallen angel and one of the Demon King's generals. After his defeat at the hands of Hero Emilia, he was secretly rescued by Olba Meyer, who promised to return Lucifer to heaven if they became allies in defeating the Demon Lord. After being defeated by the Demon Lord, Urushihara moved in with Sadao Maou and Ashiya. name: Serpico
description: Serpico is Farnese's companion and unbeknownst to her, her paternal half-brother. During his time with the Holy See, Serpico was Herald for the Holy Iron Chain Knights. When aggressive, Serpico belies his meek appearance and is comparable to a fox due to his shrewd observation and speed with a rapier. Despite Farnese's childhood abuse and her forcing him to burn his own mother at the stake, he cares deeply for his half-sister. Serpico was her servant since she found him beaten on a snowy street

name: Hidenori Tabata
description: **Height:** 175 cm (5'9") A student at Sanada North Boys High. He is the glasses-wearing character of the main trio, of which he usually gets the group involved in his crazy schemes. His older brother used to be the ringleader of the group until he went off to college. When his friends aren't around and he's alone with a girl, he over-thinks the situation.

Michiko rescues Hana from her abusive foster parents by busting through their window with her motorbike. She says that she knows Hatchin's father and that he was a good man, and that he "made her fall in love with him right away." She has a mysterious tattoo on her stomach. As the sole parental-figure and family member in Sōma's life, he is a mentor, teacher, and rival to his son. name: Magna Swing
description: __Height:__ 169 cm A member of the Black Bulls magic knight squad. Coming from Rayaka out in the countryside, he can easily bond with Asta whom he is profoundly impressed by. His magic allows him to form fireballs which he can hurl at targets. He uses them as baseballs for the unofficial welcoming ceremonies he holds for new recruits. He can also form a magic bat for hitting his fireballs.

name: Gally
description: Found in the scrapyard below the floating city Tiphares by the Hunter Warrior Daisuke Ido, Gally soon becomes a Hunter Warrior herself, hunting for bounties throughout the scrapyard city. Having no recollection of her past, Gally's only link to her memories is her "Panzer Kunst" a martial art style for cyborgs that she somehow remembers. name: PA-san
description: __Height:__ 162cm Mysterious looking female PA engineer with a mouth piercing. In her private life, she is active as a virtual Youtuber under the name "Otogi Alto" producing gameplay videos.

name: Yelena
description: Yelena is the leader of the Anti-Marleyan Volunteers working under Zeke Yeager. She was one of the Marleyan soldiers on board the first survey fleet to Paradis Island after Marley's failed attack operation. She is a very tall woman with her blonde hair styled in a short bob with straight bangs. She has large dark eyes and somewhat androgynous features due to her build and style. name: Maki Kuwana
description: Goes to the same cram school as Yatora. Under a lot of pressure to do well, as her whole family attended the prestigious Tokyo University of the Arts (Geidai), including her older sister who was the top scorer the year she applied. Cheerful and friendly, but sometimes makes dark remarks. Is a big eater, and claims that it's common for people into art because drawing burns a lot of energy.

name: Nishiki Nishio
description: __Height:__ 177 cm (5'9") Nishiki Nishio is a ghoul whose original feeding ground was taken from Rize. He is a sophomore in the Pharmaceutical Department of Kamii University and Kimi Nishino's boyfriend.
